# Simple Server Validation Test
# Just check if servers can build and start successfully

cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/mcp

# Test that servers can build successfully
echo '=== Testing mcp-echo-server build ==='
exec go build -o /tmp/mcp-echo-server examples/servers/mcp-echo-server/main.go
! stderr 'error'

echo '=== Testing mcp-time-server build ==='
exec go build -o /tmp/mcp-time-server examples/servers/mcp-time-server/main.go
! stderr 'error'

echo '=== Testing mcp-say-server build ==='
exec go build -o /tmp/mcp-say-server examples/servers/mcp-say-server/main.go
! stderr 'error'

echo '=== Testing mcp-weather-server build ==='
exec go build -o /tmp/mcp-weather-server examples/servers/mcp-weather-server/main.go
! stderr 'error'

# Clean up
rm /tmp/mcp-echo-server
rm /tmp/mcp-time-server  
rm /tmp/mcp-say-server
rm /tmp/mcp-weather-server

echo '✅ Simple Server Validation Complete'
echo 'All tested servers build successfully'
